Description: The time, in days, since the intervention was distributed and a multiplier for the **Initial_Effect**. See [example](../json/campaign-waningeffectmaplinearseasonal-durability-map.json).
The multiplier used to define the magnitude of the shape of the curve, as specified when using the parameters with the **WaningEffectMapLinearSeasonal** class.
An array of values to match the defined **Times**. See [example](../json/campaign-waningeffectmaplinearseasonal-values.json).
